_fixture.description: Terminal state. Execution did not complete OR post-execution receipt never arrived within TTL. tx_hash is null — no on-chain anchor. Distinguish from PENDING/null: FAILED is terminal (TTL expired, no recovery possible). The absence of tx_hash is verifiable externally: a verifier who queries by action_ref gets this record and can assert the action did not produce a tamper-evident outcome.

_verify.note: tx_hash null is verifiable: the verifier can confirm no anchor exists for this action_ref. FAILED + tx_hash:null is the canonical signal that no tamper-evident outcome record exists.
